title: Signature
text: Signature A Signature is a Development Object that describes the remote interface of a component, or modeled entity operation. Signatures for Uniface components and modeled entity operations are automatically generated, but signatures for non-Uniface components that Uniface can call at runtime, must be explicitly defined. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: sig Main Development Object? No. Part of: — Contains: Signature Implementation , Signature Operation , Property Generalization: Main Development Object Specializations: Component Signature, Entity Collection Signature, Occurrence Collection Signature Compilation output: ComponentName .sig Depending on the implementations, it may generate the following files: .wsdl , .cfg , .dll , .fml , Java stub, C stub URI format: sig: ComponentName sig: EntityName Was this topic helpful?
